channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 3.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Rayner settles £40k tax bill paving way to challenge Starmer for Labour leadership - latest updates
item.description: Rayner settles £40k tax bill paving way to challenge Starmer for Labour leadership - latest updates

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Why the path to No 10 is not an easy one for any of Starmer’s would-be challengers
item.description: Why the path to No 10 is not an easy one for any of Starmer’s would-be challengers

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Why Rayner being cleared over her tax affairs is a problem for Streeting’s bid for No 10
item.description: Why Rayner being cleared over her tax affairs is a problem for Streeting’s bid for No 10

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Angela Rayner says Starmer should ‘reflect on’ stepping aside after HMRC clears her over tax affairs - UK politics live
item.description: Angela Rayner says Starmer should ‘reflect on’ stepping aside after HMRC clears her over tax affairs - UK politics live

item.title: BBC Politics: At a glance: Starmer fights to stay on as prime minister

item.title: FT UK Politics: Keir Starmer’s fate hinges on individual acts of nerve
